item.title: Jump Source x Billy Woods – Empty Bars
item.description: Taken from Montreal duo Jump Source's new album Fold, out April 30th... Continue reading…
item.content:encoded: Taken from Montreal duo Jump Source's new album Fold, out April 30th... Continue reading…
item.dc:creator: Chris

item.title: Carla Dal Forno – Going Out
item.description: Carla Dal Forno shares the hauntingly yearning lead single + opening track from her forthcoming album Confession, out next month on her own Kallista Records... Continue reading…
item.content:encoded: Carla Dal Forno shares the hauntingly yearning lead single + opening track from her forthcoming album Confession, out next month on her own Kallista Records... Continue reading…
item.dc:creator: Chris

item.title: Jump Source – Shattered (feat. Helena Deland)
item.description: Montreal duo priori + Patrick Holland aka Jump Source have enlisted a dream crew of esteemed collaborators (Billy Woods, Loukeman, BEA 1991, + CFCF, to name a few) for their incredible new album Fold, with none other than Helena Deland elegantly stepping into as yet uncharted late-night club zones on dazzling lead single "Shattered"... Continue reading…
item.content:encoded: Montreal duo priori + Patrick Holland aka Jump Source have enlisted a dream crew of esteemed collaborators (Billy Woods, Loukeman, BEA 1991, + CFCF, to name a few) for their incredible new album Fold, with none other than Helena Deland elegantly stepping into as yet uncharted late-night club zones on dazzling lead single "Shattered"... Continue reading…
item.dc:creator: Chris

item.title: Nashpaints – Everyone Good is Called Molly
item.description: Dublin artist, Princ€ss member, and Maria Somerville collaborator Finn Carraher McDonald aka Nashpaints shares his wonderful new album of hazy, achingly tender, eerily out-of-time-and-place classics, out today on MirrorWorld... Continue reading…
item.content:encoded: Dublin artist, Princ€ss member, and Maria Somerville collaborator Finn Carraher McDonald aka Nashpaints shares his wonderful new album of hazy, achingly tender, eerily out-of-time-and-place classics, out today on MirrorWorld... Continue reading…
item.dc:creator: Chris

item.title: Ms Ray – Miss You (feat. Nourished By Time)
item.description: Taken from Ms Ray's Melt EP, coming in March on Scenic Route... Continue reading…
item.content:encoded: Taken from Ms Ray's Melt EP, coming in March on Scenic Route... Continue reading…

item.title: Georgia Gets By – Faded Rose
item.description: Georgia Gets By returns with "Faded Rose", the gorgeous lead single from her forthcoming debut LP Heavy Meadow, and a poignant and glowingly romantic ode to the power of commitment... Continue reading…
item.content:encoded: Georgia Gets By returns with "Faded Rose", the gorgeous lead single from her forthcoming debut LP Heavy Meadow, and a poignant and glowingly romantic ode to the power of commitment... Continue reading…
item.dc:creator: Chris

item.title: Babe Dylan – Ben & I
item.description: Thanks to our friend Ruby for putting us on to the coolest new band of 2026 (SO FAR), Babe Dylan. Only bangers from these two so far, with "Ben & I" being the stellar new single that just dropped last week, and "Vape Luv" being the undeniable, certified sleeper hit debut single that's earning the duo those coveted "industry plant" allegations... Continue reading…
item.content:encoded: Thanks to our friend Ruby for putting us on to the coolest new band of 2026 (SO FAR), Babe Dylan. Only bangers from these two so far, with "Ben & I" being the stellar new single that just dropped last week, and "Vape Luv" being the undeniable, certified sleeper hit debut single that's earning the duo those coveted "industry plant" allegations... Continue reading…
item.dc:creator: Chris

item.title: Hannah Lew – Another Twilight
item.description: Grass Widow’s Hannah Lew shares a glorious, glimmering synth-pop anthem from her self-titled solo debut LP, coming in April on Night School Records... Continue reading…
item.content:encoded: Grass Widow’s Hannah Lew shares a glorious, glimmering synth-pop anthem from her self-titled solo debut LP, coming in April on Night School Records... Continue reading…
item.dc:creator: Chris

item.title: Boyhood – A Grand Time
item.description: It's always a gift when we get a new one from Boyhood, especially when it arrives accompanied by a sick Monika Kraska video... Continue reading…
item.content:encoded: It's always a gift when we get a new one from Boyhood, especially when it arrives accompanied by a sick Monika Kraska video... Continue reading…
item.dc:creator: Chris

item.title: shinetiac – live at café blue gelato
item.description: Pontiac Streator, Ben Bondy, and shiner come in clutch to close out the year with a stellar new shinetiac release/mixtape, out today on OST... Continue reading…
item.content:encoded: Pontiac Streator, Ben Bondy, and shiner come in clutch to close out the year with a stellar new shinetiac release/mixtape, out today on OST... Continue reading…

item.title: Smerz drop Big city life EDITS featuring ML Buch, Clairo, Erika de Casier, Fine + more
item.description: Smerz continues their 2025 victory lap, dropping an incredible, star-studded collection of edits of tracks from their album of the year contender Big city life, featuring ML Buch, Clairo, Erika de Casier, Elias Rønnenfelt, Fine, Astrid Sonne, and many more... Continue reading…
item.content:encoded: Smerz continues their 2025 victory lap, dropping an incredible, star-studded collection of edits of tracks from their album of the year contender Big city life, featuring ML Buch, Clairo, Erika de Casier, Elias Rønnenfelt, Fine, Astrid Sonne, and many more... Continue reading…
item.dc:creator: Chris

item.title: Oklou – viscus (feat. fka twigs)
item.description: The deluxe version of Oklou's album-of-the-year contender choke enough is coming October 30th, and features 4 beautiful new tracks, including this one... Continue reading…

item.title: Hilary Woods – Taper
item.description: Hilary Woods' new album Night CRIÚ is out on Halloween via Sacred Bones. Video "created by Hilary Woods incorporating her own hand processed 8mm and 16mm film, archive material and polaroids"... Continue reading…

item.title: Jessy Lanza – Slapped By My Life
item.description: The incomparable Jessy Lanza shares the heartfelt title track from her new EP Slapped By My Life, described as a "bittersweet love letter to Jessy's husband and frequent collaborator Winston H. Case, conceived when he was undergoing cancer treatment"... Continue reading…
item.content:encoded: The incomparable Jessy Lanza shares the heartfelt title track from her new EP Slapped By My Life, described as a "bittersweet love letter to Jessy's husband and frequent collaborator Winston H. Case, conceived when he was undergoing cancer treatment"... Continue reading…
item.dc:creator: Chris

item.title: Joanne Robertson + Oliver Coates – Always Were
